title: Anthem Discs
description: A mod that adds over 200 national anthems to minecraft in the form of music discs.
body:
## **Anthem Discs**
The mod adds a total of 211 diffrent music discs. The music discs are the national anthems of various countries and terratories.

_As it stands now, the items are not obtainable in survial. But that will be updated._

Github:
[Anthem-Discs-Github](https://github.com/Trulle1234/anthem-discs-fabric-1.21.2)

Please report bugs to: trulle.123.contact@gmail.com

The current anthems are:
